name: Barbequed Pork Ribs/Currant Glaze
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Pork loin back ribs or 1 1/2 lb Spareribs
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------GLAZE-----------------------------------
1/2 cup Red currant jelly
3 tbsp Orange juice
1 tbsp Lemon juice
1 tbsp Dijon mustard
Thin orange slices (garnish)
1. Combine the first five ingredients and rub on the meaty side of the ribs.
2. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.
3. About an hour before serving, start cooking the ribs 10 to 12 inches from coals (or under broiler), turning occasionally.
4. Pork will take 60 to 70 minutes to cook depending on thickness.
5. Meanwhile, heat the red currant jelly, orange juice, and lemon juice with mustard in a small saucepan over low heat until combined.
6. Brush ribs with the glaze during the last 15 minutes of cooking.
7. Garnish with orange slices before serving.
